summary: Iteration 96: Scadenziario & Cost Management module testing complete. All 23 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: ScadenziarioPage loads with KPI cards, filters, timeline; Scadenziario link correctly placed under Acquisti & Magazzino; Fatture Ricevute moved from Commerciale to Acquisti. Fixed missing 'settings' import in fatture_ricevute.py causing 500 error on FIC sync.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: fatture_ricevute.py L908 was missing 'from core.config import settings' import causing NameError on sync-fic endpoint
ScadenziarioPage uses localStorage.getItem('session_token') for Bearer auth - consistent with other pages
Scadenziario dashboard correctly aggregates: fatture_ricevute payment deadlines, welder patentino expiries, instrument calibrations, commessa delivery dates
Cost imputation endpoint correctly handles both destinazione=commessa (adds costi_reali to commessa) and destinazione=magazzino (updates articoli with weighted avg pricing)
seed_data_creation: Test fatture created with past due dates (scaduto) and current month due dates (in_scadenza) for KPI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scadenziario module verified working. Test user has existing welder patentino deadlines (3 visible in scadenziario timeline). FattureInCloud sync returns 502 due to expired FIC license (expected behavior). Cost imputation to both commessa and magazzino tested and working.

test_classes: TestScadenziarioDashboard (7 tests) - dashboard endpoint, KPI structure, scadenze aggregation
TestCostImputaCommessa (4 tests) - imputation to commessa, validation errors
TestCostImputaMagazzino (2 tests) - create/update articoli with weighted avg price
TestFICSyncEndpoint (2 tests) - FIC sync error handling, auth
TestExistingFattureRicevuteCRUD (6 tests) - existing CRUD still works

verified: 4 KPI cards displayed (Da Pagare Scaduti, Da Pagare Mese, Acquisti Anno, Da Processare)
Timeline grouped by month with scadenze items
Sidebar: Scadenziario link under Acquisti & Magazzino
Sidebar: Fatture Ricevute moved from Commerciale to Acquisti
